title: Skin Biopsy: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ay be removed at the time of the skin biopsy or soon after. Often, no other treatment is needed. If you are diagnosed with melanoma, you will need more tests to see if the cancer has spread. Then you and your provider can develop a treatment plan that's right for you.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
